targetProject.description: The target project to connect to
targetProject.x-prompt: Select the target project to connect to

sourceComponent.description: The source component to connect from (component name, path relative to source project root, or generator id). Use '.' to explicitly select the project as the source.

targetComponent.description: The target component to connect to (component name, path relative to target project root, or generator id). Use '.' to explicitly select the project as the target.
